concept: Careless / Not Giving Attention / Lacking Care
description: Not giving sufficient attention or thought to avoiding harm or errors. 'Muko' names the quality of carelessness—attention absent, care neglected.
sound_symbolism: The word neglects. 'Mu' begins with closed lips, mindfulness absent. 'Ko' cuts with hard indifference. Carelessness as the failure of inner attention, a mind that has stopped paying attention to what matters.
grammatical_notes: Functions as an adjective: 'muko riola' (careless labor). Opposite of 'thesa' (careful). Names a state requiring correction—carelessness causes harm.

pillars.secular-buddhist-philosophy: Carelessness is absent mindfulness—the unaware mind that acts without seeing consequences.
pillars.pre-industrial-wisdom: Careless work wasted precious materials—attention was essential when resources were hard-won.
